name: Arjuna Bandara
message: Looking to build a 3-bedroom villa in Chilaw area with an internal courtyard and high ceilings. Interested in a site visit.

name: Sajith Perera
message: We have an old colonial house in Negombo that needs a complete structural renovation with modern tropical interiors.

name: Nilani Silva
message: I am interested in architectural drawings for a compact luxury home. No construction required at this stage.

name: Kamal Gunaratne
message: Planning a boutique hotel project in Galle. Need experts in tropical modern architecture.

name: Prasanna Wickramasinghe
message: Inquiry regarding land acquisition assistance in the North Western province alongside construction.
